default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Q2 growth targets and strategies for increasing traffic and qualified opportunities for Siit.](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Siit faces ambitious Q2 targets: 128 qualified opportunities (2x Q1) and increased revenue](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Current traffic (\~6-7K monthly visitors) and conversions are below target, causing concern](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [Need to identify short-term growth tactics while balancing long-term SEO investments](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)
  - [Opportunity to create more interconnected, compound-effect marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=842.0)

## Topics

### Q2 Targets and Current Performance

  - [Q2 target: 128 qualified opportunities (42/44/42 for Apr/May/Jun)](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Q1 performance: 59 qualified opportunities total](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Current conversion rates: 20% website visitors to trial/demo, \~37% trial/demo to closed-won](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [April performance so far: 3 qualified opportunities (1 inbound, 2 outbound) as of April 12th](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)

### Traffic and Analytics Challenges

  - [Recent 4-day data loss due to Google Tag Manager removal](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=213.0)
  - [Discrepancies between Google Analytics 4 (21K sessions) and PostHog (17K sessions)](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Recommendation to focus on "sessions" metric for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Consider potential impact of non-brand vs. brand traffic on conversion rates](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1270.0)

### Current Marketing Initiatives

  - [Increasing Google Ads spend (\~$900/week) with plans for optimization](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Upcoming trade show in London (May)](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2064.0)
  - [Content creation and SEO focus with GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [New AI agent beta launch in development](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2353.0)

### Potential Growth Strategies

  - [Leverage founder (Shalom) for thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2623.0)
  - [Create more video content for product demonstrations](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2434.0)
  - [Explore "dev tool" positioning to resonate with IT audience](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
  - [Enhance presence on integration marketplaces (Slack, Rippling, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=3159.0)
  - [Develop deeper content around integration use cases and benefits](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=3226.0)
  - [Increase visibility of Slack integration on website](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=3388.0)
  - [Consider A/B testing for website optimizations](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=3406.0)

### Challenges and Considerations

  - [Limited historical data for accurate forecasting](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Difficulty in tracking and capitalizing on community-driven channels (Reddit, Slack groups)](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [Balancing short-term gains with long-term SEO investments](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [Need for more interconnected marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=3506.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Carmel to email Kyle's recommended Google Ads consultant](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=3692.0)
  - [Kyle to discuss Siit's growth challenges with Marcel for additional insights](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=3017.0)
  - [Explore ways to leverage GrowthX beyond typical blog content creation](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=3048.0)
  - [Develop a list of growth hypotheses and potential "big swing" initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=3539.0)
  - [Consider website updates to highlight Slack integration more prominently](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=3451.0)
  - [Next meeting scheduled for Wednesday at 9am Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/y8ze84rHgwFz3TWxsQ-s_xsNn8Fo-FMs?tab=summary&timestamp=3726.0)

action_items.description: Email Omer re Google Ads optimization for Q2 short-term gains
Speak w/ Marcel Mon re advice for Carmel's Q2 targets + big swing ideas
Email Kyle's recommended Google Ads consultant for potential engagement
